title: subscription_active detection in write task uses string contains: fragile pattern match
description: ws.rs write task (line 524): if json.contains(r#"method":"subscription_active""#) sets subscribed_flag. This is string-scanning a JSON payload to detect the method. If the serialization format changes (e.g. method field order, whitespace), the detection silently breaks and subscribed_flag is never set during the session, causing clients to get SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED errors even after paying. Should use a typed side-channel (e.g. a second AtomicBool updated by the WS handler when it builds the notification) rather than inspecting serialized JSON.
